title: French Golden Gratin Casserole
description: A rich and creamy casserole made with golden potatoes, brown onions, and savory sausage, topped with a crispy gratin crust.
instructions: Peel the potatoes and slice them into 1/8-inch thick rounds.
In a large skillet, cook the sausage over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the sliced onions to the skillet and cook until they are softened and lightly browned.
In a separate saucepan, melt the French butter over medium heat.
Add the grated cheese to the saucepan and stir until it is melted and smooth.
Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish with some of the melted butter.
Arrange a layer of potatoes in the bottom of the baking dish.
Top the potatoes with a layer of the sausage and onion mixture.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Sprinkle the fresh thyme over the top of the cheese.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
